widgets_values: Separate the Image into layers. In this example we have asked for only 2 layers . A Foreground and a background . The process will return 3 Images. The ORiginal COmposite , the Background and the foreground.
This node Grope lets you easily extract from a batch of images. You can change the index if you extract even more layers, and the background layer will be prepped for Qwen Image .
